Home › Scholarships › Turkey and Australia
Turkey and Australia

Turkish Government and Australian Awards Scholarships for Asylum Seekers and Refugees

Published 9 Jun 20264 min read✍ MigrantScholar Team✓ Verified 9 Jun 2026
Advertisement

As an asylum seeker or refugee, pursuing higher education can be a daunting task, especially when navigating a new country's system. Fortunately, the Turkish government and Australian Awards Scholarships offer various opportunities for individuals in these situations to access education, develop skills, and engage with their communities. In this article, we will delve into the specifics of these scholarships, including eligibility criteria, application processes, and available opportunities.

Introduction to Turkish Government and Australian Awards Scholarships

The Turkish government and Australian Awards Scholarships provide asylum seekers and refugees with the chance to acquire new skills, pursue higher education, and become integral members of their communities. These scholarships not only cover educational expenses but also foster personal growth and community engagement.

Who Qualifies

To be eligible for these scholarships, asylum seekers and refugees must fall under specific visa categories, including:

* Temporary Protection Visa (TPV)

* Safe Haven Enterprise Visa (SHEV)

* Permanent Protection Visa (PPV)

* Humanitarian Settlement Visa

* Refugee Visa

* Asylum Seeker Visa

* Bridging Visa

* Protection Visa

Available Scholarships

There are numerous scholarships available for asylum seekers and refugees, each with its unique benefits and eligibility criteria. Here are five notable scholarships:

Australian Awards Scholarship

The Australian Awards Scholarship provides full tuition coverage, a stipend of $30,000 per year, and other benefits. Eligibility includes being a citizen of a participating country, having a minimum of 18 months of work experience, and meeting specific language requirements. The deadline for application is April 30, 2026. For more information, visit https://www.australiaawards.gov.au/.

Turkey Scholarships for Refugees

Turkey Scholarships for Refugees offer full tuition coverage, a monthly stipend of $400, and accommodation support. Eligibility includes being a refugee or asylum seeker in Turkey, meeting specific language requirements, and having a strong academic record. The deadline for application is June 20, 2026. For more information, visit https://www.turkiyeburslari.gov.tr/.

Turkish Government Scholarship for International Students

The Turkish Government Scholarship for International Students provides full tuition coverage, a monthly stipend of $600, and accommodation support. Eligibility includes being a citizen of a participating country, meeting specific language requirements, and having a strong academic record. The deadline for application is February 20, 2026. For more information, visit https://www.turkiyeburslari.gov.tr/.

Australia Awards Scholarships for Asylum Seekers

Australia Awards Scholarships for Asylum Seekers offer full tuition coverage, a stipend of $25,000 per year, and other benefits. Eligibility includes being an asylum seeker in Australia, meeting specific language requirements, and having a strong academic record. The deadline for application is March 31, 2026. For more information, visit https://www.australiaawards.gov.au/.

Refugee Scholarship Program

The Refugee Scholarship Program provides a stipend of $10,000 per year, tuition coverage, and accommodation support. Eligibility includes being a refugee or asylum seeker, meeting specific language requirements, and having a strong academic record. The deadline for application is May 15, 2026. For more information, visit https://www.unhcr.org/.

Application Process

To apply for these scholarships, follow these steps:

  • Check the eligibility criteria for each scholarship and ensure you meet the requirements.

  • Gather all necessary documents, including academic transcripts, language proficiency test results, and visa documentation.

  • Register for an account on the scholarship provider's website.

  • Fill out the online application form and upload all required documents.

  • Submit the application before the deadline.

  • Wait for the scholarship provider to review your application and contact you for an interview or further documentation.

  • Attend an interview or provide additional documentation as required.

  • Receive notification of the scholarship outcome and accept the offer if successful.

Documents Checklist

When applying for these scholarships, ensure you have the following documents:

* Academic transcripts

* Language proficiency test results (e.g., IELTS or TOEFL)

* Visa documentation (e.g., TPV, SHEV, or PPV)

* Passport

* Birth certificate

* Proof of residency

* Proof of refugee or asylum seeker status

Frequently Asked Questions

Here are some common questions asylum seekers and refugees may have about these scholarships:

  • What is the deadline for applying for the Australian Awards Scholarship?

  • How do I apply for the Turkey Scholarships for Refugees?

  • What are the language requirements for the Turkish Government Scholarship for International Students?

  • Can I apply for multiple scholarships at the same time?

  • How long does it take to receive a response after submitting an application?

  • What are the benefits of the Australia Awards Scholarships for Asylum Seekers?

  • How do I know if I am eligible for the Refugee Scholarship Program?

  • Can I appeal the decision if my scholarship application is rejected?

For more information on these scholarships, visit the official government websites, such as https://www.homeaffairs.gov.au/ and https://www.mfa.gov.tr/.

Asylum seekers and refugees can access more information and resources on education, skills development, and community engagement on our blog at https://migrantscholar.vercel.app/blog.
